metadata.description: DrVibe AI — clinical agent plugins for physicians. Educational/workflow tools; not medical advice. Public, non-PHI data only.

plugins.name: the-ai-physician
plugins.description: Practice-management toolkit for attending physicians: clinical research, finances, operations, HIPAA-readiness, and patient education. Ships the @drvibeai/clinical-apis-mcp server preconfigured.
plugins.author: DrVibe.ai

plugins.name: the-ai-resident
plugins.description: Clinical toolkit for residents: notes, differentials, case presentations, evidence lookup, I-PASS handoffs, and procedure prep. PGY-adaptive; ships the @drvibeai/clinical-apis-mcp server.
plugins.author: DrVibe.ai
